parameters.jsonBody:
={
  "user_id": "{{ $('Aggregate Per User').item.json.user_id }}",
  "channel": "email",
  "type": "weekly_summary",
  "subject": "Resume de la semaine",
  "content": "{{ $('Aggregate Per User').item.json.nb_ventes }} ventes - {{ $('Aggregate Per User').item.json.total_ca }} EUR",
  "sent_at": "{{ new Date().toISOString() }}",
  "status": "sent"
}
